/plan "Fix the issues with the geogrid and geopoint searches with the worker. Problem: The geogrid job we ran on the development server brings back inconsistent results, some empty geopoints, missing some meta data, missing stats, missing the gridX and gridY position of the point, missing the userId and agencyId (could be null or empty string) that submitted the job. Check the output file here : 'worker/logs/geogrid-jobs/355955d0-6632-43b8-b17e-4c52a65e76c2.json'". Expected Results: consistent points array elements, no missing job or point data, no missing stats"
Normalize result structure: Ensure all point results use consistent array format instead of mixed object/array, it is an arry of objects
